title: psorospermum aurantiacum
intro: Psorospermum aurantiacum, also known as the yellow fever plant, is a medicinal plant native to tropical Africa. The bark of this plant is rich in a compound called quinine, which has been used for centuries to treat malaria and other fever-related illnesses due to its antimalarial and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Psorospermum aurantiacum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate symptoms of malaria, and provide relief from inflammation and pain. Herbal preparations of the plant, often in the form of a tincture or infusion, can be used to treat various health conditions, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using any medicinal plant.
